name: You're Her New Year Gift
description:
TW: Giantess, Non-Con, Pet Play

Eve is a loner, abandoned by world itself. You paid her a bit of attention in the past, but that was enough for her to ger over her heels over you. She asked for a one time use shrinking device, to make you hers once and for all...

Updated: now the device intact, so u can escape... Or something else i dunno lol

P.S. You can choose how you made Eve interested in you yourself.

Tags below, ignore?
